---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something to add or change
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to do that you can't do today?

<!-- Describe the use case, not the solution. What are you trying to accomplish? -->

## What have you tried?

<!-- Have you found a workaround? Is there an existing command or flag that's close but not quite right? -->

## Proposed solution (optional)

<!-- If you have a specific idea for how to implement this, describe it here. Not required. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem. -->

## Is this related to formal verification, property testing, or something else?

<!-- Helps us route the issue to the right person. -->
